name: ai-meeting-automation-hub
description: Microsoft Copilot Meeting Automation Hub Demo

scripts.setup: PATH="/Users/bhargav/integration of copilot/.node/bin:$PATH" npm install && cd server && PATH="/Users/bhargav/integration of copilot/.node/bin:$PATH" npm install && cd ../client && PATH="/Users/bhargav/integration of copilot/.node/bin:$PATH" npm install
scripts.dev: PATH="/Users/bhargav/integration of copilot/.node/bin:$PATH" concurrently -n "server,client" -c "yellow,blue" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:server: cd server && PATH="/Users/bhargav/integration of copilot/.node/bin:$PATH" npm run dev
scripts.dev:client: cd client && PATH="/Users/bhargav/integration of copilot/.node/bin:$PATH" npm run dev
scripts.build: cd server && PATH="/Users/bhargav/integration of copilot/.node/bin:$PATH" npm run build && cd ../client && PATH="/Users/bhargav/integration of copilot/.node/bin:$PATH" npm run build
